description:
Offered: may be less than once every two years
The Co-generation and Waste Recycling course will focus on analyzing engineering and co-generation systems to meet industrial process needs and use of reject heat to integrate with the production plant. The course will also cover responsibilities of co-generators and their interconnection cost. Students will run computer programs for metering practices and other metering options.
Prerequisite(s): ENGT 1000 and ENGT 3000
